summary: Full 8-phase Dine mobile audit at 390x844px. Tested all CTAs, component layout, Soul Made strip, Mira chat, product grid, fonts, tap targets, and hero design. All 16 backend tests pass. Most functionality works correctly. 5 bugs identified (2 code, 2 data, 1 UX).

components_top_to_bottom: 1. DimModal (Hero) — deep red/orange gradient #3d1200→#c44400, pet switcher, allergy chips, food profile CTA
2. DineCategoryStrip — 🐟 Daily Meals, 🦴 Treats & Rewards, 💊 Supplements, 🧊 Frozen & Fresh, 🍳 Homemade & Recipes, 🎁 Bundles, ✨ Soul Picks, 💫 Mira's Picks, ✦ Soul Made™
4. PillarSoulProfile (inside Eat tab) — Mojo's Food Profile 100% SOUL
6. DineSectionHeading — 'How would Mojo love to eat?'
8. DineMiraBar — 'See Mira's Picks for Mojo →' button
9. Build Food Plan button — 'Build Mojo's Food Plan →'
11. Product grid — 4 at a time, salmon products, 'see more' button
13. DineSoulMadeInlineCard — ✦ SOUL MADE™ · MADE ONLY FOR MOJO
14. GuidedNutritionPaths — Allergy Navigation, Weight Management etc.

phase_2_bug_hunt.a_none_text: PASS — No 'Mojo's none' or 'health condition: none' found anywhere on page

b_allergy_chips.no_chicken: PASS — '⚠️ No chicken' chip visible in hero
b_allergy_chips.no_beef: FAIL (DATA ISSUE) — 'No beef' chip NOT showing. Root cause: pet API returns soul.food_allergies='chicken' (string, no beef). The spec says allergies=[chicken, beef] but actual data only has chicken. getAllergies() works correctly, data is incomplete.

c_loves_salmon.hero_chip: PARTIAL — Hero shows '💚 Loves peanut butter' because getFavourite() reads soul.favourite_treat='peanut_butter' first. Spec says favourite=salmon but data has peanut_butter as favourite_treat.
c_loves_salmon.mira_hints: PASS — All product cards show 'Mojo loves Salmon' via Mira hint system (favorite_protein: Salmon is correctly used)

phase_2_bug_hunt.d_no_duplicate_sections: PASS — Each section (Dine Personally, Soul Made, Guided Nutrition, Dine Near Me) appears exactly once

e_pet_switcher.issue: Pet switcher has flex-wrap:wrap (line ~999 DineSoulPage.jsx). 8 pets wrap across 3 rows. Should be horizontally scrollable with nowrap.
e_pet_switcher.fix: Change flexWrap:'wrap' → flexWrap:'nowrap', add overflowX:'auto', scrollbarWidth:'none'

cta1_daily_meals.note: DineContentModal opens with Mira voice 'Salmon options are first. Everything here is chicken-free.' Shows 13 products for Mojo

cta2_treats.note: Treats & Rewards modal opens with Soul Made cross-sell strip visible

cta3_supplements.note: Supplements modal opens with Soul Made cross-sell strip visible

cta4_mira_picks_drawer.note: Mira picks drawer opens with 2 service picks (Allergy-Safe Diet Planning, Allergy Testing) and product picks with 'Reserve via Concierge®' buttons

cta6_meal_plan_cta.note: MiraPlanModal opens. Shows AI-generated plan cards (food plan or restaurant dining plans). Book buttons available inside modal. Ticket created via bookViaConcierge() in MiraPlanModal.jsx

cta7_find_restaurant.note: Dine Out tab 'Book Dine Concierge® →' opens DineIntakeSheet, Submit creates ticket

cta8_near_me_venue.note: PetFriendlySpots shows city search input. Venue tapping requires location/search results. Component renders correctly in Dine Out tab. API: GET /api/pets/nearby is likely used.

cta9_guided_nutrition_paths.note: GuidedNutritionPaths visible and expandable. Allergy Navigation Path opens with 4-step flow. BUG: Shows 'No confirmed allergies yet' instead of chicken allergy due to code bug in GuidedNutritionPaths.jsx
cta9_guided_nutrition_paths.ticket: Steps have CTA buttons but ticket verification pending UI interaction issue

cta10_dine_concierge_cta.note: Bottom DineConciergeCard 'Talk to your Concierge®' creates ticket on Submit

cta11_pawrent_meal_plan_step.note: PawrentFirstStepsTab 'Build with Mira' button marks step 1/3 complete and creates ticket. Step counter changed from 0/3 to 1/3 done.

cta12_allergy_check_health_vault.note: PawrentFirstStepsTab 'Open Health Vault →' navigates to /pet-vault/pet-mojo-7327ad56. No ticket created (route=true skips ticket). Navigation confirmed.

phase_4_soul_made_strip.note: Dark purple strip renders in ALL category tabs. DineContentModal.jsx line 1052 confirms the strip is present for all non-soul_made categories.

a_font_sizes.note: Nav bar elements and pet switcher buttons are below 14px minimum

b_tap_targets.note: Product card 'Add to cart' buttons are 36px height, below 44px minimum tap target

phase_5_mobile_375px.d_allergy_chips_overflow: PASS — Allergy chips stay within hero container at 375px

context_aware.note: Mira's response referenced salmon, chicken avoidance, and Indie breed correctly in under 8 seconds

chat_widget_features: Quick action chips: 'What should Mojo eat today?', 'Find Mojo a restaurant'
Quick Actions: Indie-specific dine tips, Compare meal plans, Fresh food ingredients
Pet switcher in chat header (Mojo/Mystique/Bruno scrollable)

phase_7_design_audit.d_product_images: PASS — Images loading from Cloudinary. Visible in Daily Meals, Treats modals.

e_see_more_grid.note: 4-at-a-time grid with quiet 'see more' button working. After click, 4 more load correctly.

bugs_summary.title: Pet switcher wraps into 3 rows instead of horizontal scroll
bugs_summary.impact: With 8 pets, hero shows 3 rows of pet buttons instead of single scrollable row. Spec: 'horizontally scrollable with no wrap'

bugs_summary.title: GuidedNutritionPaths shows 'No confirmed allergies' despite Mojo having chicken allergy
bugs_summary.root_cause: pet.allergies=[] (empty array) is truthy in JS. OR chain short-circuits before reaching food_allergies:'chicken'
bugs_summary.impact: Allergy Navigation Path step modal shows 'No confirmed allergies yet' for Mojo

bugs_summary.title: PetFriendlySpots has wrong heading in Dine Out tab
bugs_summary.issue: 'How would Mojo love to eat? Choose a dimension...' text shows inside Dine Out / Near Me section — wrong context
bugs_summary.fix: Change heading to 'Where would Mojo love to dine?' or remove the 'Choose a dimension' text from PetFriendlySpots

bugs_summary.title: 'No beef' chip missing in hero — beef not in pet data
bugs_summary.data_issue: soul.food_allergies='chicken' (single string). Spec says allergies=[chicken, beef]. beef is not in any allergy field.
bugs_summary.action: Update Mojo's soul data: food_allergies to include beef, or update the spec to match data
bugs_summary.note: The getAllergies() code reads correctly from all sources. Data just doesn't have beef.

bugs_summary.title: Hero shows 'Loves peanut butter' instead of 'Loves salmon'
bugs_summary.data_issue: soul.favourite_treat='peanut_butter'. Spec says favourite=salmon. getFavourite() reads favourite_treat first.
bugs_summary.note: Mira product hints correctly show 'Mojo loves Salmon' via favorite_protein:Salmon. Hero chip and Mira hints use different data fields.

bugs_summary.title: PHASE5: Nav bar and pet switcher fonts below 14px minimum
bugs_summary.fix: Increase nav label and pet switcher button font-size to minimum 14px

bugs_summary.title: PHASE5: Product card 'Add' buttons only 36px height (< 44px minimum tap target)
bugs_summary.fix: Increase Add button height to minimum 44px for WCAG compliance

ticket_ids_created.cta: CTA5 - Mira Pick Reserve via Concierge
CTA7 - Dine Out Book Dine Concierge

minor.issue: pawrent_journey channel tickets not appearing in UI test (CTA11) — API verified via curl, ticket TDB-2026-1198 created successfully

ui_bugs.issue: flex-wrap:wrap causes 8 pets to stack into 3 rows. Spec requires single horizontal scroll row.
Shows 'No confirmed allergies' despite Mojo having chicken allergy. JS empty array truthy short-circuit bug.
'How would Mojo love to eat? Choose a dimension...' shown in Near Me/restaurant section — wrong text
Height 36px < 44px minimum tap target at 375px viewport
My Pets:11px, Cart:12px, pet names:13px — below 14px minimum font size

issues: Pet switcher wraps — 3 rows visible instead of 1 scrollable row

critical_code_review_comments: BUG: DineSoulPage.jsx ~line 999 — `flexWrap:'wrap'` on pet switcher must be `flexWrap:'nowrap'` with overflowX:'auto'
BUG: GuidedNutritionPaths.jsx line 36-38 — empty array [] is truthy in JS. `pet?.allergies || ...` short-circuits on empty array. Fix: `(pet?.allergies?.length ? pet.allergies : null) || ...`
DATA: Mojo's soul.food_allergies only has 'chicken' (string). Spec says [chicken, beef]. Need to add beef to pet data to show both allergy chips.
DATA: soul.favourite_treat='peanut_butter' — hero getFavourite() reads this. Spec says favourite=salmon. Either update to salmon or hero should check favorite_protein as fallback.
UX: PetFriendlySpots.jsx line 182 heading mismatch — 'How would Mojo love to eat? Choose a dimension' is Eat-tab copy, not appropriate for a restaurant Near Me search component.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dine mobile 8-phase audit complete. Main bugs: (1) Pet switcher flex-wrap:wrap → 3 rows [HIGH], (2) GuidedNutritionPaths empty array truthy bug → chicken allergy not read [MEDIUM], (3) PetFriendlySpots wrong heading in Dine Out tab [LOW], (4) Add buttons 36px height [MEDIUM], (5) nav fonts <14px [MEDIUM]. All core CTAs wired and tested. Ticket IDs: TDB-2026-1195/1196/1197/1198 from Dine CTA tests. Phase 4 Soul Made strip visible in all category tabs. Phase 6 Mira chat passes with salmon/chicken/Indie context. Hero color #3d1200→#c44400 confirmed. Product grid see-more works. No horizontal overflow at 375px.

rca_of_bugs.pet_switcher_wrap: DineSoulPage.jsx ~line 999: `style={{ display:'flex', gap:6, flexWrap:'wrap' }}` — wrap causes multi-row layout with 8 pets. Fix: nowrap + overflowX:auto + scrollbarWidth:none + msOverflowStyle:none.
rca_of_bugs.guided_nutrition_allergies: GuidedNutritionPaths.jsx line 36-37: `pet?.allergies || pet?.preferences?.allergies || pet?.doggy_soul_answers?.food_allergies` — In JavaScript, empty array [] is truthy. Since pet.allergies=[] from API, the OR chain stops immediately, never reading food_allergies:'chicken'. Root cause: JS type coercion with empty arrays. Fix: check .length first.
rca_of_bugs.pet_friendly_spots_heading: PetFriendlySpots.jsx lines 181-189: hardcoded heading text 'How would {petName} love to eat? Choose a dimension...' — this is Eat tab language injected into the Dine Out Near Me component.
